creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
Created attachment 253339
a 10mm x 10mm x 10mm cube STL file to test.

So we just got this one to compile in the last ticket, but it doesn't work.   As just one example of how broken it is: it cannot load an STL file.  If you open the file dialogue, STL files are not listed as a supported file.  If you choose "all files" and then proceed to choose an STL file, it will bring up a dialog saying that the file format is not supported.

For reference: STL files are the primary interchange format for 3D printers and Every other Cura I have access to supports them OOTB.  I will include an STL file attached to this bug ... that is a 10mm^3 cube.  Close to the simplest STL there is.

Now... there are also a lot of plugins that aren't working.  These may be other issues.  Plugins are important and so far most plugins have been shared between linux and windows (at least).  There may be more things other than STL files that are broken.

To replicate: compile and install Cura, File->Open, Select "show all files" from the dropdown in the file dialog, try to load an STL (like the one included).
